positive: A minimalist, stylized forest scene rendered in bold negative space and solid silhouettes. The main subject is a grouping of whimsical woodland creatures—stylized deer, foxes, and hares—integrated into ancient, gnarled tree roots and oversized ferns. The palette should be restricted to deep forest emerald green, burnt umber brown, and creamy off-white, utilizing strong chiaroscuro contrast. The composition must be highly centered and symmetrical, suitable for screen printing or screen-printed vector graphics. The art style should resemble refined Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e inspired linocut) but without direct cultural appropriation, focusing solely on the graphic, stylized elements. Crisp lines, high contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for a high-quality apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low detail, photorealistic, gradient, messy, cluttered
